aboutUs.title: About us
aboutUs.subtitle: Luca knows every bend. You just have to ride.
aboutUs.intro: Rent&Ride was born from a passion for two wheels and the Marche region. We're not just another rental: we're the starting point for anyone who wants to experience roads, curves and landscapes for real.
aboutUs.story: We opened in Pesaro to offer tourists and riders a service built around travel: well-maintained bikes and scooters, delivery where you need it, and advice on the best routes. Every vehicle is ready to go; every itinerary has been ridden by us first.
aboutUs.guarantees: All our vehicles are insured and serviced. We offer RCT coverage and clear excess options. Deposit and terms are transparent: no surprises, just the road ahead.
aboutUs.value1: Passion for the land and for riding
aboutUs.value2: Transparency on prices, terms and vehicles
aboutUs.ctaSub: Choose your ride, discover our tours or get in touch with any question.
